nodes.context: A Fujinomiya-based yakuza group founded by Tadamasa Goto, affiliate of Yamaguchi-gumi.
Japan's largest yakuza syndicate, based in Kobe.
A faction within Yamaguchi-gumi led by Kiyoshi Takayama.

edges.evidence_quote: He was the founding head of the Goto-gumi, a Fujinomiya-based affiliate of Japan's largest yakuza syndicate, the Yamaguchi-gumi.
edges.context: Goto-gumi is a secondary affiliate of Yamaguchi-gumi.

edges.evidence_quote: Goto began disappearing from the yakuza scene in 2008 after allegedly being forced into retirement by the Kobe headquarters' ruling faction led by Kiyoshi Takayama of the Kodo-kai.
edges.context: Kodo-kai is a ruling faction within Yamaguchi-gumi.
